headline: Equinix Inc (NASDAQ:EQIX) Shares Dip 3% After Q1 Earnings Beat but Revenue Miss
summary: Equinix (EQIX) reported Q1 2026 earnings beating EPS estimates by 142%, but missed revenue expectations, causing a 3% after-hours stock drop despite raising full-year guidance.

headline: Latin America Data Center Colocation Databook Report 2026: $3.7 Billion Market Led by Ascenty, Equinix and Odata as Regional Operators Expand Hyperscale Capacity Across Brazil and Mexico
summary: Latin America's data center colocation market is expanding, driven by hyperscale investment, enterprise cloud adoption, and data localization laws in Brazil and Mexico. Key growth arises from AI and GPU workloads, regulatory compliance, and energy infrastructure investments, overcoming constraints to meet rising demand.
